local_qwen_hallucination.body:
The local speech recognition model isn't working right now.
Please switch to a cloud speech recognition service.

We recommend Deepgram. You can use it for free with welcome credits.
Open the GitHub guide and follow the setup instructions.
discord_auth.body:
PuriPuly gives new users a free usage allowance.
That's about 600–700 translated utterances.
You'll receive it right after Discord verification.

We don't keep personal information.
We only check the minimum information needed for verification.

If you received a Pass ID from a friend, enter it here.
You and your friend can each get 200 extra translations.
discord_auth.waiting_body: After you finish Discord verification in your browser, PuriPuly will continue automatically.
discord_auth.callback_received_body:
Discord verification received

PuriPuly is preparing your Managed key.
This window will close when translation starts.
discord_auth.referral_id.label: Pass ID
discord_auth.referral_reward_applied: You and your friend got 200 extra uses.
auth.callback.title: PuriPuly
auth.callback.line2: PuriPuly is finishing the connection in the app.
discord_auth.error.email_unverified: Please verify your Discord email, then try again.
discord_auth.error.account_too_new: This Discord account is too new for the free beta right now.
discord_auth.error.lifetime_used: This Discord account has already used the free beta.
discord_auth.error.hardware_duplicate: This device has already used the free beta.
discord_auth.error.daily_cap: Free beta sign-ups are full for today. Please try again tomorrow or use your own API key.
discord_auth.error.expired: The Discord verification link expired. Please start again.
discord_auth.error.loopback_unavailable: PuriPuly could not open the local verification callback. Please try again or use your own API key.
discord_auth.error.retry: Discord verification failed. Please try again.
peer_translation_eula.body:
PuriPuly captures desktop audio via loopback to translate the other person's voice.
This means it may process someone's audio without their consent, or audio from conversations you are not part of.
Depending on your region, this could violate local laws.

You are legally responsible for how you use this tool.
Whenever possible, please use it only in conversations you're actively participating in, and make sure you have the other person's consent.

PuriPuly does not store the other person's audio, transcripts, or translation results.
However, your configured external speech recognition and translation providers may process the data.
peer_translation.disclosure:
Peer translation is on.
Audio around me may be captured.
openrouter.handoff.letter.p1:
Thank you for using PuriPuly Heart.
The credits I added have run out.
openrouter.handoff.letter.p2:
How was it?
I hope it brought you moments of novelty, surprise,
and joy along the way.
openrouter.handoff.letter.p3:
If you'd like to keep using it,
please get your own API key.
openrouter.handoff.letter.p4:
I've written the instructions in the README.
Take it step by step — it shouldn't be hard.
openrouter.handoff.letter.p5:
If you get stuck or have any suggestions,
feel free to reach out to me anytime.

managed_release.revoked_contact: The access key is damaged. Contact me to get a new key.
managed_release.restart: Managed OpenRouter setup must be restarted from TRANS.

dashboard.local_stt_notice_missing: Qwen ASR model not downloaded — MIC won't work until downloaded

provider.local_qwen.description: Your computer runs the model directly on CPU. It doesn't use VRAM
provider.qwen_asr.description: Better speech recognition than the local model
toggle.off.description: Translates after you finish speaking. Saves costs
settings.dashboard_language_redirect: Change self and peer language pairs from the Dashboard language card.
settings_modal.requires_api_key: Requires API key — set it in Settings
dashboard.mute_sync.tooltip.off: Mute Sync (off) — click to enable. When on, speech-to-text won't send a chatbox message while your mic is muted in VRChat.
dashboard.mute_sync.tooltip.active: Mute Sync (on) — speech-to-text won't send a chatbox message while your mic is muted in VRChat.
dashboard.mute_sync.tooltip.syncing: ⚠ Mute Sync isn't synced with VRChat yet — until you toggle your mic in VRChat once, EVERYTHING you say is transcribed and sent to chat even while muted. Toggle your mic in-game to sync (turns green).
dashboard.mute_sync.warn_relay: ⚠ Mute Sync: until you toggle your mic in VRChat once, everything you say is sent to chat even while muted.
dashboard.mic.tooltip:
Mic — speech-to-text for your own voice.
Transcribes what you say so it can be translated and shown/sent.
dashboard.peer.tooltip:
Peer — speech-to-text for other people's voices.
Transcribes what others say (desktop/game audio) so it can be translated for you.
dashboard.trans.tooltip:
Trans — translation.
Converts the transcribed speech/text into your target language(s).
dashboard.lang.autodetect.self: Auto Detect — the app figures out which language you're speaking each time, instead of assuming one fixed language. Good when the language varies; picking a specific language is faster and more accurate if you know it.
dashboard.lang.autodetect.peer: Auto Detect — the app figures out which language the other person is speaking each time, instead of assuming one fixed language. Good when the language varies; picking a specific language is faster and more accurate if you know it.
dashboard.loopback.menu.selected: Loop back only my selected languages
dashboard.loopback.tooltip:
Send peer voice to VRChat chatbox (original + translation).
Right-click for options (loop back all vs. only your selected languages).
dashboard.peer_filter.notice: Hid a peer voice that isn't {names}. Peer voice is set to a specific language, so other languages are excluded — choose 'Auto Detect' for peer voice to show every language.
dashboard.deepl.usage.nocap: DeepL: {used} characters used (Pro / pay-as-you-go — no monthly cap)
dashboard.overlay.options.title: Overlay Options
dashboard.overlay.tooltip:
Subtitles overlay — shows translations on your screen (desktop or VR).
Click to toggle on/off. Right-click for opacity and message options.
Lock it once positioned so it doesn't block your mouse clicks.
dashboard.lang.fixed.self:
Your spoken language: {language}.
What you say is recognized as {language}, then translated.
dashboard.lang.fixed.peer:
Peer language: {language}.
The other person's speech is recognized as {language}, then translated for you.
dashboard.overlay.lock.unlocked: Lock the overlay in place so it doesn't block your mouse clicks.
dashboard.overlay.mode.vr_tooltip: Overlay is in VR mode — it only appears inside SteamVR, not on your monitor. Switch to Desktop mode to see it on screen.
dashboard.overlay.mode.desktop_tooltip: Overlay is in Desktop mode — captions show on your monitor.
dashboard.overlay.mode.label: Display mode
dashboard.overlay.single_turn.label: Single-turn (one line)
dashboard.overlay.lock.locked: Unlock the overlay to move or resize it.
dashboard.lang.fixed.target:
Translate to: {language}.
What you say is translated into {language}, then shown/sent.
dashboard.lang.fixed.peer_target:
Read peer in: {language}.
What the other person says is translated into {language} for you to read.
dashboard.translit.show.tooltip: Show {system} (romanization) above the text in the app and overlay.
dashboard.translit.send.tooltip: Include {system} (romanization) in the message sent to the VRChat chatbox.
dashboard.tooltip.your_spoken_lang:
Your spoken language — sets the microphone (STT) recognition language.
Also used as source for text translation.
Click to change; select Auto Detect to let it guess.
dashboard.tooltip.peer_spoken_lang:
The language your peer speaks.
Set this so incoming audio translates correctly.
Auto Detect works if you're unsure.
dashboard.tooltip.language_settings_expa: Language settings — click to expand sidebar
dashboard.tooltip.download_qwen: Download the Qwen ASR local model (~980 MB)
dashboard.tooltip.filter_peer: When on: only shows received messages from your configured Peer voice language(s)
settings.live_preview.tooltip: When ON, your typed or spoken text appears in the chat immediately while waiting for the translation to arrive.
settings.chatbox_send_peer.tooltip: When ON, incoming peer speech is sent to the VRChat chatbox — original text first, then the translation, so your peer can verify accuracy.
settings.show_pinyin.tooltip: Show pinyin (romanised Mandarin pronunciation) beneath Chinese characters in the chat log.
settings.show_romaji.tooltip: Show romaji (romanised Japanese pronunciation) beneath Japanese characters in the chat log.
settings.send_pinyin.tooltip: Include pinyin in the text sent to the VRChat chatbox alongside the Chinese translation.
settings.send_romaji.tooltip: Include romaji in the text sent to the VRChat chatbox alongside the Japanese translation.
settings.show_latin.tooltip: Show Latin-script transliteration for other scripts (e.g. Arabic, Korean, Thai) beneath the text in the chat log.
settings.send_latin.tooltip: Include Latin transliteration in the text sent to the VRChat chatbox.
settings.self_in_overlay.tooltip: When ON, your own translated messages also appear in the overlay caption window, not just the other person's.
settings.filter_peer_by_target_languages:
When ON, only processes peer audio that matches your configured language pair.
Filters out speech in unrecognised or unexpected languages.
dashboard.tooltip.your_language_info:
Your spoken language (top card) — what you say.
Your translation target (bottom card) — what it gets translated into.
Tap either card to change. Use + to add a second target language.
